visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a denim newsboy cap is speaking enthusiastically to the camera in a brightly lit exhibition hall. He wears a white t-shirt and a lanyard with 'MSI' text. The background is a white-walled booth with technology branding. (2) Close-up shots of a compact, futuristic-looking desktop PC case with the brand 'TECNO'. The case features transparent panels showing colorful RGB lighting and internal liquid cooling tubes. A small digital display on the case shows 'GPU 01% 36C'. (3) The camera pans to a large monitor mounted on the wall displaying high-end 3D video game graphics of a character in a forest setting. The compact PC is placed on a white table below the monitor. (4) The man returns to the frame, gesturing toward the PC and monitor while continuing his enthusiastic explanation. (5) A hands-on comparison is shown: a grey smartphone (iPhone 12 mini) is placed on top of and then next to the compact PC case to demonstrate its small physical dimensions. (6) The man concludes by pointing at the camera and giving a positive expression, standing in front of the tech exhibition background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥 @3ctim. [Slogan]: 傳音非洲之王. (2) [Subtitle]: 傳音非洲之王 手機非洲佔比都他們的. (3) [Subtitle]: 但是我今天在COMPUTEX. (4) [Subtitle]: 看到他們有一個超小型水冷的主機耶. (5) [Subtitle]: 裡面還跑了4060. (6) [Subtitle]: 重點是它接下來還會跑. (7) [Slogan]: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060. (8) [Subtitle]: 導演 你知道它跑黑悟空嗎?. (9) [Subtitle]: 這麼小還跑黑悟空. (10) [Subtitle]: 我有很訝異 而且你知道嗎?. (11) [Subtitle]: 因為我個人是小主機的喜好者. (12) [Subtitle]: 所以我自己本身的主機就是能小就多小. (13) [Subtitle]: 那你知道我現在已經很小囉. (14) [Subtitle]: 但是我最多只能塞到 GeForce RTX 2080. (15) [Subtitle]: 如果再往上的話 我的主機的空間就不夠用了. (16) [Subtitle]: 聽說它接下來的下半年呢 這一台. (17) [Subtitle]: 裡面就會裝 RTX 5060. (18) [Subtitle]: 它小到什麼程度你知道嗎?. (19) [Subtitle]: 它小到就是它的寬度跟深度. (20) [Variety]: iPhone 12 mini. [Subtitle]: 大概一個iPhone 12 mini的身高. (21) [Subtitle]: 然後呢高度大概兩台iPhone 12 mini. (22) [Variety]: 水冷的喔!. [Subtitle]: 重點它還是水冷的喔!. (23) [Subtitle]: 好啦 我問他有沒有賣好了 好不好?. (24) [Subtitle]: 這我會有興趣買. (25) [Subtitle]: 好 我們來看下一個產品. (26) [Subtitle]: 欸 我們現在就在COMPUTEX.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing glasses, a denim-style newsboy cap, and a white t-shirt with a tech-branded lanyard.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern technology exhibition booth at Computex, featuring white walls, bright LED lighting, and display stands for electronic products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high energy and clarity in Traditional Chinese, displaying a professional yet excited tone suitable for tech vlogging. The speech rate is brisk with dynamic intonation. (2) Background features a consistent, low-level ambient murmur typical of a large public event like a trade show. No background music is present, allowing the vocal delivery to remain the primary focus. (3) The recording quality is clear, with a high signal-to-noise ratio despite the public setting, indicating good microphone handling or post-production cleanup.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Feature -> Size Comparison -> Personal Reaction.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a unique, ultra-compact liquid-cooled gaming PC from TECNO at the Computex tech expo, highlighting its ability to run demanding games despite its small size.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker enthusiastically presents the product, highlights its specific features (NVIDIA GPU), and expresses a personal desire to purchase it.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy tech vlog format common on social media, using size comparisons to emphasize product portability.
